case_title: FRAN BATES VS. CHRISTINE M. NOLAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BATES, FRAN AS TO DEFENDANT NOLAN, CHRISTINE M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED FEB-23-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NOLAN, CHRISTINE M.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATES, FRAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NOLAN, CHRISTINE M. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THE PERSONAL LIABILITY OF DEFENDANT CHRISTINE NOLAN; AS DISTINCT FROM STEELWILL, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED; POS FILED PRIOR.
